name: Bollos (Using Cooked Peas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the peas in water to cover overnight.
2. Drain and place in a saucepan with fresh water to cover.
3. Add the sliced onion and bruised garlic. Bring the water to a boil.
4. Simmer for about 2 hours or until the peas are soft. Drain well.
5. Puree in a food mill or food processor.
6. Add the crushed garlic, chili peppers, and salt; mix well.
7. Form into 1-inch balls and roll in the flour, shaking off any excess.
8. Heat the oil to 350 degrees.
9. Carefully drop the balls in, a few at a time.
10. Fry for about 1 minute or until golden brown.
11. Drain on paper towels and serve.
